title: Browse live trade feed and open a session detail
description: Verifies a guest can load the home feed with session cards, status and stats, then open a session detail view from the feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Verify the session detail view is displayed
Verify the 5-step audit timeline is displayed

title: Guest can monitor trade feed and open a session detail
description: Verifies that a guest can load the home feed and navigate into a session detail view successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the home feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Verify the session detail view is displayed
Verify the 5-step audit timeline is displayed

title: Run on-chain verification and view per-step results
description: Verifies a user can initiate on-chain verification for a session and see per-step verification result badges displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Initiate on-chain verification for the session
Wait for verification to finish
Verify per-step verification result badges are displayed
Verify an overall verification status is displayed

title: Feed shows skeleton then populates from cache and refreshes
description: Verifies the home feed shows a loading skeleton initially and then displays sessions once data is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the initial loading state to appear
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Verify session cards are displayed in the feed
Verify the stats bar and portfolio summary are displayed

title: Inspect audit timeline, reasoning, and raw JSON on a session
description: Verifies a guest can expand a timeline step to view reasoning and confidence and expand raw session JSON for inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Expand one audit step in the timeline
Expand the raw session JSON section
Verify expanded step details are displayed
Verify raw session JSON content is displayed

title: Agent status and portfolio summary are visible on home
description: Verifies the home page surfaces the agent online/offline indicator and portfolio summary alongside the feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Verify an agent online/offline status indicator is displayed
Verify a portfolio summary section is displayed

title: Open session detail and return to feed
description: Verifies a guest can navigate from the feed into a session detail view and then return to the feed without losing the ability to browse sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Click the back navigation control in the session detail view
Verify the trade feed is displayed
Verify session cards are displayed in the feed

title: Guest can connect wallet and see address plus INIT balance on home
description: Verifies that a user can connect an Initia wallet and then see their address in navigation and an INIT balance card on the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate wallet connection from the top navigation
Complete wallet connection in the wallet modal
Verify the connected wallet address is displayed in the navigation area
Verify the INIT balance card is displayed on the home page

title: Verification results persist while expanding and collapsing steps
description: Verifies verification status remains visible and consistent while the user expands and collapses timeline steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Initiate on-chain verification for the session
Wait for verification to finish
Expand an audit step in the timeline
Collapse the expanded audit step
Verify per-step verification result badges are still displayed
Verify the verification status remains displayed

title: Attestations list is displayed on session detail
description: Verifies the session detail view shows a list of attestations (or an empty state) for the session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Scroll to the attestations section
Verify an attestations list or empty state is displayed

title: Feed refreshes via polling without breaking the session list
description: Verifies the feed continues to display sessions after a polling interval refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Wait for 12 seconds
Verify session cards are still displayed in the feed
Verify the page remains interactive for selecting a session

title: Copy a step hash from session detail
description: Verifies a guest can copy a transaction hash from a timeline step and receives a visible confirmation of the copy action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the feed to finish loading
Click a session card in the feed
Expand one audit step in the timeline
Trigger the copy-hash action for that step
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Wallet connect is accessible from non-home pages and persists when navigating
description: Verifies that connecting a wallet from another page persists and is still shown when returning to home.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Initiate wallet connection from the top navigation
Complete wallet connection in the wallet modal
Click the navigation link to go to the home page
Verify the connected wallet address is displayed in the navigation area
Verify the INIT balance card is displayed on the home page

title: Disconnecting wallet returns UI to guest state on home
description: Verifies that a connected user can disconnect and the UI returns to the guest state without showing address/balance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate wallet connection from the top navigation
Complete wallet connection in the wallet modal
Open the wallet menu from the navigation area
Disconnect the wallet
Verify the navigation shows the disconnected state instead of a wallet address
Verify the INIT balance card is not displayed

title: Home page shows a clear connect prompt when wallet-required actions are available
description: Verifies that when not connected, the home page presents a clear wallet connection call-to-action for wallet-required functionality.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the home feed to finish loading
Verify a connect wallet call-to-action is visible on the page
